1.title: Getting Started with Affilabs
1.content:
Affilabs is Affinity Instruments' SPR data acquisition software. To get started:

1. Connect your SPR instrument via USB
2. Launch Affilabs - it will auto-detect your device
3. Run OEM LED Calibration (Settings tab)
4. Start acquiring data using the Start Recording button

For detailed tutorials, visit the Support section on our website.

2.title: SPR Technology Overview
2.content:
Surface Plasmon Resonance (SPR) is a label-free detection method for measuring biomolecular interactions in real-time. Affinity Instruments provides compact, user-friendly SPR systems suitable for research and quality control applications.

Our instruments offer:
• Multi-channel detection (up to 4 channels)
• Real-time kinetic measurements
• Temperature control
• Integrated microfluidics

Learn more about SPR technology on our website.

3.content:
